faqs.question: How much does drain fly treatment cost in South Bronx?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment services in South Bronx range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, the number of drains affected, and the size of your property. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate drain flies in my South Bronx building?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly infestations can be eliminated within 1-2 treatments. We offer same-day and next-day service throughout South Bronx neighborhoods, with initial results visible within 24-48 hours as we treat breeding sites and eliminate larvae in drains and pipes.

faqs.question: Why do I have drain flies in my South Bronx apartment or business?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and sewage systems. South Bronx's many older buildings often have aging plumbing that accumulates the biofilm and debris where drain flies lay eggs. Kitchens, bathrooms, basements, and commercial drains are common problem areas.

faqs.question: Do you service all South Bronx neighborhoods for drain fly problems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide drain fly treatment throughout the entire South Bronx area, including Mott Haven, Melrose, Hunts Point, Longwood, Morrisania, Port Morris, and all surrounding neighborhoods. Our technicians are available 7 days a week for emergency and scheduled services.
